category_title: Students who use inappropriate physical contact to initiate or enter conversations
scenario_title: Attempting to enter a conversation during lunch
minimal_context: The student is sitting in the cafeteria during lunchtime attempting to join a group conversation.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's all talk together while we eat our lunch.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits on the right side while the tutor turns towards the speaker on their left, turning their back to the student.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What did you bring in your lunchbox today?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Attempts to enter the conversation using physical means of gaining attention.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please wait, I am listening to someone else right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Resorts to hitting the listener on the back to gain attention because they want to talk.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's all talk together while we eat our lunch.

STUDENT: (Sits on the right side while the tutor turns towards the speaker on their left, turning their back to the student.)

TUTOR: What did you bring in your lunchbox today?

STUDENT: (Attempts to enter the conversation using physical means of gaining attention.)

TUTOR: Please wait, I am listening to someone else right now.

STUDENT: (Resorts to hitting the listener on the back to gain attention because they want to talk.)
